raw_output:
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Intent",
  "name": "TemporalStatisticalVisualization",
  "description": "Show the distribution of fertility rate across countries and years.",
  "intentSchema": {
    "@type": "IntentSchema",
    "title": "TemporalStatisticalVisualization",
    "description": "Show the distribution of fertility rate across countries and years.",
    "fields": [
      {
        "@type": "Field",
        "name": "country_code",
        "type": "nominal",
        "role": "id"
      },
      {
        "@type": "Field",
        "name": "country",
        "type": "nominal",
        "role": "dimension"
      },
      {
        "@type": "Field",
        "name": "year",
        "type": "temporal",
        "role": "time",
        "unit": ""
      },
      {
        "@type": "Field",
        "name": "fertility_rate",
        "type": "quantitative",
        "role": "measure",
        "unit": "births per woman"
      }
    ],
    "required": [
      "country_code",
      "year",
      "fertility_rate"
    ]
  },
  "validity": {
    "@type": "Validity",
    "time_field": "year",
    "year_min": 1960,
    "year_max": 2024,
    "distinct_years": 65,
    "recent_10_start": 2015,
    "recent_10_end": 2024,
    "previous_10_start": 2005,
    "previous_10_end": 2014,
    "temporal_granularity": "year",
    "latest_year": 2024
  }
}
